LanguageData.Chocolate.description: A carefully wrapped cache of pre-war chocolate. Rich, sweet, and still decadent enough to anchor desserts and syrups.
LanguageData.Chocolate.label: preserved chocolate
LanguageData.VCE_DigestibleResurrectorNanites.descrip: A rare pre-war medical suspension repackaged for the Lucky 38 kitchen. When folded into food, aqua cura floods the body with emergency repair nanites that can drag a diner back from death.
LanguageData.VCE_DigestibleResurrectorNanites.label: aqua cura
LanguageData.VCE_RawSpices.description: A preserved blend of pre-war kitchen spices sealed away in a Lucky 38 pantry tin. Enough survives inside each can to brighten stews, sauces, and grills.
LanguageData.VCE_RawSugar.description: Sealed packets of pre-war sugar recovered from old kitchens and pantry caches. It keeps indefinitely and still delivers the same quick rush of sweetness.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.description: A dense, intoxicating butter churned for indulgent Lucky 38 cooking. It spreads rich, hits hard, and turns any meal into a bad idea with excellent flavor.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.label: brahmin shroom butter
